text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dia, I… I was totally clueless. About what it means to run at 
Tracen Academy, and probably about everything else too.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I pictured myself training and growing stronger… and winning 
lots of glamorous races! I fully believed I could do it if I just 
worked hard enough.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But I never imagined what that "hard work" would actually look 
like, or how much of it I'd need to put in if I really wanted to win.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Teio overcomes all those challenges and keeps on running. 
That's what makes her so strong and incredible.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yeah… You're right.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
To become someone like her… Do I really have 
what it takes to push myself that far?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Do I really have what it takes to put a smile on people's faces?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I know what you mean. It's a scary thing. We just learned 
how tough the racing world really is, after all.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You feel the same?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I thought I had the necessary resolve, but I was just being naive.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Still, you know what? I think we're going to be just fine!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Because I'm right beside you, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember what Nature told us before? 
The thing you need to become a shining star…

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, sorry. Yeah, I'm talking about the protagonists 
of the academy. You'll see Teio and McQueen aren't 
the only shining stars here.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everyone here has dreams and the raw skills to 
see them through. It's a hearty full-course feast 
of protagonists, each with their own rivals!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dreams, skills… and rivals.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita, you're a very precious friend to me… but you're 
just as precious to me as a rival!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Remember when we first met? That day, you had come 
to help with some volunteer work.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You were the first horsegirl my age I had 
ever talked to, so I was really nervous.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And I was surprised that there was someone out there 
faster than me! It really opened my eyes…!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
After that, you took me to lots of new places. You taught me 
so many things, like how to play the games at the candy 
shop and how to take a tumble.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You led the way as we ran together, opening my eyes to the 
vastness of the world around us. Staring at your back in front 
of me, I came to realize something.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I wanted to surpass you — to take the lead myself.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia…

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
For as long as I've known you, you've always 
loved helping people. …Maybe you were just 
showing me the same kindness.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But it was different for me. I've always seen you as a rival.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's true that the other students here are incredible. 
No matter how hard we work, we may never catch up 
to them. But even so…!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As long as you're running ahead of me, I won't stop trying 
to overtake you. I'll keep improving until I can.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: So let's keep running together, Kita. From now until forever!

text_block_list.name: Them as children
text_block_list.text: Cross my heart and hope to die. Together forever, you and I!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(That's right. From the first time I met Dia, I knew 
she was different from my other friends.)

text_block_list.name: Young Satono
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win a G1 race and make 
everyone's dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(She was naive and a little detached, but she never cried 
when she fell. And she was always upfront and honest 
to me about her dreams…)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(No matter how hard I tried to sprint ahead, she always stuck 
close behind. Eventually, we wound up running side by side.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (It was frustrating… and it made me want to get better.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Dia. I guess I let my worries get the better of me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But having a rival to push you in the right direction… 
That's such an inspiring thought!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita…!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I may not know everything about dreams or what it means 
to run… or even my own potential. But still…!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I have a rival to run alongside me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's why no matter how tough things get, I'll be okay. 
I can smile and overcome any obstacle with you by my side, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I should warn you… I won't let you catch up 
to me during races! So you'd better be ready!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: …! Same here! I don't plan on losing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Someday, I'm gonna become a stronger version 
of myself and achieve my dreams…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Because I've decided to chase them with you!
